test.observation: No test files found (test suite for linter is m2-linter-ci milestone)

lint.observation: Shows usage message when run without files - linter is functional

lint-all.observation: All 3 samples passed validation: kanban, mobile-onboarding, cli-dashboard

validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-SPEC-001: PASS - SPEC.md (line 617) and schema.json (line 38) both have 13 state types: loading, empty, error, success, offline, permission-denied, idle, scrollback, editing, search-active, streaming, refreshing, field-selected
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-SPEC-002: PASS - backStack enum in SPEC.md (line 638) and schema.json (line 59) both contain: Push, Pop, Replace, No, Modal
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-SPEC-003: PASS - SPEC.md Section 5.3 now says SCREEN-<lowerCamelCaseName>, schema pattern ^SCREEN-[A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$ allows lowercase first letter
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-SPEC-004: PASS - STATE pattern in SPEC.md (line 614) ^STATE-[A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9-]*$ matches schema.json (line 37), both allow hyphens
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-SPEC-005: PASS - ROLE pattern in SPEC.md (line 648) ^ROLE-[A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$ matches schema.json (line 70)
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-SPEC-006: PASS - Pop now documented in SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A, embedded schema updated
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-DOCS-001: PASS - No github.com/ui-md-standard references in documentation files
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-DOCS-002: PASS - README.md no longer claims npm install -g ui-md-linter works, correctly documents node tooling/ui-md-linter/ui-md-lint.js
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-DOCS-003: PASS - README.md, tooling/ui-md-linter/README.md, tooling/vscode-extension/README.md all specify Node.js ≥18
validationAssertionsStatus.VAL-DOCS-004: PASS - All GitHub links use Ola-Turmo/UI.md, no broken links

fixesApplied.description: fix(spec): update embedded schema state type enum to 13 types - addresses prior blocking issue VAL-SPEC-001
fix(spec): update embedded schema patterns and AGENTS.md back-stack values - addresses prior blocking issues VAL-SPEC-004 and VAL-SPEC-005
